doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: Document is dated March 2026 (future date) and makes legally implausible claims that contradict established EDPB guidance that pseudonymized data remains within GDPR scope if re-identification is possible.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date from the training perspective) and describes EDPB guidance that does not exist in any verifiable form, with specific claims about GDPR scope that contradict established EDPB positions that pseudonymized data where re-identification is possible remains within GDPR scope regardless of key-holder status.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: Document is dated March 2026 (future date) and makes legally implausible claims that contradict established EDPB guidance that pseudonymized data remains within GDPR scope if re-identification is possible.
